## Description

A clear description of what went wrong.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Run `serpentine serve <path>`
2. ...

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include full error output if applicable.

## Environment

- Serpentine version (`serpentine --version`):
- OS:
- Python version:
- Language of the analyzed project (Python / JS / TS / Rust):

## Additional Context

Any other relevant details — e.g. the project structure, a minimal reproduction, or a screenshot.
